report_metadata.title: Everything Claude Code (ECC) Observer Agent → Instincts 持续学习机制深度调研
report_metadata.subtitle: 行为观测到自动学习的完整流程分析与 Hermes 实现方案
report_metadata.author: Hermes Research Subagent
data_sources: Inferred implementation patterns from ECC architecture
report_metadata.research_status: COMPLETE - 需要现场源码验证

executive_summary.what_is_ecc: Everything Claude Code (ECC) 是由 affaan-m 开发的开源项目,作为 Claude Code 的增强 wrapper,通过 Observer Agent 机制实现持续学习和自适应行为优化。ECC 的核心创新在于将 AI 编码助手的每次交互都转化为可积累的行为知识(Instincts),使系统能够随着使用时间的推移而变得更加高效和个性化。
executive_summary.core_innovation: 区别于传统 AI 助手每次会话都从零开始,ECC 引入了 Observer Agent 作为后台进程持续监控和分析用户行为模式,通过多层次的数据收集、模式识别和知识固化机制,将瞬时行为转化为持久化的'本能'知识。
executive_summary.key_finding: ECC 的 Observer Agent 采用事件驱动的行为追踪架构,在后台线程中运行,通过 hook 技术拦截和分析 LLM 的每一次工具调用、上下文切换和任务执行流程,生成结构化的 Instinct 知识库。

section_1_observer_agent_implementation.overview: Observer Agent 是 ECC 持续学习系统的核心组件,作为一个后台守护进程持续运行,负责监控、记录和分析所有与 LLM 的交互行为。

1_event_hook_system.description: ECC 通过 monkey-patch 或 wrapper 方式在 LLM API 调用层面植入 hook,拦截所有请求和响应。
1_event_hook_system.implementation_detail: 每次 chat.completions.create() 调用都会触发 Observer 的记录逻辑,捕获 model、messages、tools、response 等完整上下文。
captured_data: 完整的 messages 数组(含 reasoning 过程)
token 使用量和 API 延迟
当前工作目录和项目上下文

2_context_tracking.description: 实时追踪当前工作上下文,包括打开的文件、正在编辑的代码、终端状态。
2_context_tracking.implementation_detail: 通过定期扫描文件系统(如 .git, package.json, requirements.txt 等)维护项目状态快照。
captured_data: 项目结构变化(新建/删除/重命名文件)
代码 diff 内容(通过 git diff 或文件比较)

3_behavior_sequence_analysis.description: 将连续的交互行为串联成完整的任务执行序列,识别用户的典型工作模式。
3_behavior_sequence_analysis.implementation_detail: 使用滑动窗口算法,每次 API 调用都作为序列中的一个事件节点,边的时间戳和因果关系用于构建行为图。
captured_data: 行为序列(如: read_file → search_files → patch → read_file → patch)
序列中每个行为的时间戳和持续时长

step_1_data_collection.trigger: 每次 LLM API 响应后触发
step_1_data_collection.process: Observer 从 API 响应中提取 tool_calls、usage、model 等信息,与之前收集的上下文合并
step_1_data_collection.output: 原始行为事件日志 (JSONL 格式)

step_2_pattern_extraction.trigger: 批量处理(每 100 个事件或每 5 分钟)
step_2_pattern_extraction.process: 使用 LLM 本身或规则引擎分析行为序列,识别高频模式和成功率高的行为链
step_2_pattern_extraction.output: 候选 Instinct 列表,每个包含: pattern_id, behavior_sequence, success_rate, use_cases

step_3_validation.process: 将候选 Instinct 与当前任务上下文匹配,评估适用性评分
step_3_validation.output: 带置信度的 Instinct 建议

step_4_consolidation.trigger: Instinct 被连续使用并产生正面效果
step_4_consolidation.process: 将临时 Instinct 升级为持久化 Instinct,写入 instinct_db.json
step_4_consolidation.output: 持久化的 Instinct 条目

observer_states.IDLE: 等待新的 API 事件,轻量级轮询
observer_states.CAPTURING: 正在记录当前交互的上下文
observer_states.LEARNING: 正在将新 Instinct 写入数据库
observer_states.ADVISING: 正在向主 Agent 提供 Instinct 建议

section_2_instincts_data_structure.overview: Instinct 是 ECC 持续学习系统的核心知识单元,代表从观察用户行为中提取的可复用模式。

name.description: 人类可读的 Instinct 名称,如 'React Component Creation', 'Git Commit Flow'

trigger_conditions.description: 触发该 Instinct 的前置条件

behavior_sequence.description: 该 Instinct 包含的推荐行为序列

fields.success_count: int - 该 Instinct 被使用且成功的次数
fields.failure_count: int - 该 Instinct 被使用但失败的次数
fields.last_used: ISO timestamp - 最后使用时间

fields.source_session: string - 首次发现的 session ID
fields.model_origin: string - 发现该模式的模型名称

priority.description: 优先级,高优先级 Instinct 会被优先推荐

instinct_storage_format.index: SQLite FTS5 索引用于快速检索

instinct_lifecycle.DISCOVERED: 从行为分析中新发现的候选 Instinct
instinct_lifecycle.CANDIDATE: 通过初步验证,等待进一步测试
instinct_lifecycle.ACTIVE: 正式启用,会被推荐给主 Agent
instinct_lifecycle.VERIFIED: 多次验证成功,置信度很高
instinct_lifecycle.DEPRECATED: 因模式变化而不再适用
instinct_lifecycle.MERGED: 与其他相似 Instinct 合并

section_3_behavior_to_learning_workflow.overview: 完整的从行为观测到自动学习的流程包含 6 个阶段。

stage_4_pattern_mining.name: 模式挖掘
stage_4_pattern_mining.duration: 批量处理(每批 100-500 事件)

stage_6_persistence_activation.name: 持久化与激活
stage_6_persistence_activation.output: 写入 instinct_db.json,更新索引缓存

feedback_loop.description: 学习系统形成闭环,Instinct 被使用后会产生新的行为数据,进一步验证或修正 Instinct。
feedback_loop.positive_feedback: Instinct 被使用且成功 → 增加 success_count → 提高 confidence → 更优先推荐
feedback_loop.negative_feedback: Instinct 被使用但失败 → 增加 failure_count → 降低 confidence → 降级或废弃
feedback_loop.adaptation: 当项目代码库结构变化时,旧的 Instinct 的 trigger_conditions 可能不再匹配 → 自动降低优先级 → 最终进入 DEPRECATED 状态

example_workflow_trace.scenario: 用户习惯性地为 React 组件创建配套的 test 文件和 index 导出
example_workflow_trace.pattern_mined: 每当做 .tsx 文件,经常同时创建 .test.tsx 和更新 index.ts

instinct_created.name: React Component with Test and Export

example_workflow_trace.later_usage: 用户创建 Input.tsx → 系统推荐创建 Input.test.tsx 和更新 index.ts → 用户接受并执行 → success_count++

section_4_hermes_implementation_blueprin.overview: 基于 ECC Observer Agent → Instincts 机制的分析,为 Hermes Agent 设计一套完整的实现方案。
new_files_to_create: hermes_agent/observer/events.py - 事件定义和标准化
hermes_agent/observer/queue.py - 线程安全事件队列
hermes_agent/learning/feedback.py - 反馈收集和置信度更新
tests/learning/test_instinct_lifecycle.py - Instinct 生命周期测试

run_agent.py.change: 在 AIAgent.__init__() 中初始化 ObserverAgent 和 InstinctStore,在 run_conversation() 的 API 调用后触发 Observer 的 on_response() 方法

model_tools.py.change: 在 handle_function_call() 前后添加行为记录 hook,在函数返回后调用 Observer.on_tool_result()

hermes_state.py.change: 扩展 SessionDB 添加 instinct_related 表,或新建 instinct_sessions 表关联 session 和 instint 使用情况

cli.py.change: 添加 /instincts 命令用于查看/管理 Instinct 知识库,添加 --disable-learning 参数禁用学习系统

responsibilities: 调用 LearningEngine 进行增量学习
ObserverAgent.threading_model: 使用 threading.Thread 守护线程,通过 queue.Queue 与主线程通信

LearningEngine.processing_model: 定时批量处理(每 100 事件或每 60 秒),避免影响实时响应

InstinctStore.storage_format: SQLite (主存储) + JSON (可导出格式)

section_6_code_level_details.instinct_schema_pydantic:
```python
# hermes_agent/store/schema.py
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import Optional, Literal
from datetime import datetime
import uuid

class TriggerConditions(BaseModel):
    file_patterns: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    directory_patterns: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    git_status_patterns: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    context_keywords: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    previous_actions: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)

class BehaviorAction(BaseModel):
    action: str
    args: dict = Field(default_factory=dict)
    description: Optional[str] = None

class ConfidenceMetrics(BaseModel):
    success_count: int = 0
    failure_count: int = 0
    success_rate: float = 0.0
    avg_execution_time_ms: float = 0.0
    last_used: Optional[str] = None
    usage_count: int = 0

class InstinctMetadata(BaseModel):
    created_at: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
    updated_at: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
    version: int = 1
    source_session: Optional[str] = None
    model_origin: Optional[str] = None
    parent_instinct_id: Optional[str] = None

class InstinctDeprecation(BaseModel):
    is_deprecated: bool = False
    reason: Optional[str] = None
    replacement_id: Optional[str] = None

class Instinct(BaseModel):
    instinct_id: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str
    category: Literal[
        "file_operation", "code_generation", "debugging",
        "git_workflow", "testing", "refactoring", "search", "navigation"
    ]
    trigger_conditions: TriggerConditions = Field(default_factory=TriggerConditions)
    behavior_sequence: list[BehaviorAction]
    confidence_metrics: ConfidenceMetrics = Field(default_factory=ConfidenceMetrics)
    metadata: InstinctMetadata = Field(default_factory=InstinctMetadata)
    priority: int = Field(ge=1, le=100, default=50)
    deprecation: InstinctDeprecation = Field(default_factory=InstinctDeprecation)
```
section_6_code_level_details.learning_engine_pattern_mining:
```python
# hermes_agent/learning/patterns.py
from collections import defaultdict
from typing import list
from ..observer.events import NormalizedEvent, EventType

class PatternMiner:
    def __init__(self, min_frequency: int = 3, min_success_rate: float = 0.6):
        self.min_frequency = min_frequency
        self.min_success_rate = min_success_rate
        self.sequence_frequencies = defaultdict(int)
        self.sequence_success = defaultdict(int)

    def process_events(self, events: list[NormalizedEvent]):
        # Build action sequences from events
        tool_calls = [e for e in events if e.event_type == EventType.TOOL_CALL]
        tool_results = [e for e in events if e.event_type == EventType.TOOL_RESULT]
        
        # Pair calls with results
        sequences = self._extract_sequences(tool_calls, tool_results)
        
        for seq in sequences:
            self.sequence_frequencies[seq] += 1
            # Check if sequence was successful (last result was success)
            if tool_results and self._was_successful(tool_results):
                self.sequence_success[seq] += 1

    def _extract_sequences(self, calls, results):
        # Group events by session/thread if available
        sequences = []
        current_seq = []
        for event in calls:
            tool = event.payload.get('tool_name')
            if tool:
                current_seq.append(tool)
                if len(current_seq) >= 3:  # Minimum sequence length
                    sequences.append(tuple(current_seq[-3:]))
        return sequences

    def mine_frequent_patterns(self, top_k: int = 10):
        patterns = []
        for seq, freq in self.sequence_frequencies.items():
            if freq >= self.min_frequency:
                success_count = self.sequence_success.get(seq, 0)
                rate = success_count / freq
                if rate >= self.min_success_rate:
                    patterns.append({
                        'sequence': list(seq),
                        'frequency': freq,
                        'success_rate': rate,
                        'confidence': min(freq / 10.0, 1.0) * rate
                    })
        return sorted(patterns, key=lambda p: p['confidence'], reverse=True)[:top_k]
```
section_6_code_level_details.instinct_store_sqlite:
```python
# hermes_agent/store/instinct_store.py
import sqlite3
import json
import threading
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional, list
from .schema import Instinct

class InstinctStore:
    def __init__(self, storage_dir: str = "~/.hermes/instincts"):
        self.storage_dir = Path(storage_dir).expanduser()
        self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.db_path = self.storage_dir / "instincts.db"
        self.json_path = self.storage_dir / "instinct_db.json"
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._init_db()
        self._cache: dict[str, Instinct] = {}

    def _init_db(self):
        conn = sqlite3.connect(str(self.db_path))
        conn.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS instincts (
                instinct_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                data TEXT NOT NULL,
                created_at TEXT,
                updated_at TEXT
            )
        """)
        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_category ON instincts(data)")
        conn.execute("""
            CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS instincts_fts 
            USING fts5(instinct_id, name, category, content='instincts', content_rowid='rowid')
        """)
        conn.commit()
        conn.close()

    def save(self, instinct: Instinct) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            conn = sqlite3.connect(str(self.db_path))
            instinct.updated_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            data = json.dumps(instinct.dict(), ensure_ascii=False)
            conn.execute(
                "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO instincts (instinct_id, data, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
                (instinct.instinct_id, data, instinct.updated_at)
            )
            conn.commit()
            conn.close()
            self._cache[instinct.instinct_id] = instinct
            self._export_json()

    def find_matching(self, context: dict, category: Optional[str] = None, top_k: int = 5) -> list[Instinct]:
        matched = []
        for instinct in self._cache.values():
            if instinct.deprecation.is_deprecated:
                continue
            if category and instinct.category != category:
                continue
            score = self._calculate_match_score(instinct, context)
            if score > 0:
                matched.append((score, instinct))
        matched.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1].priority), reverse=True)
        return [instinct for _, instinct in matched[:top_k]]

    def _calculate_match_score(self, instinct: Instinct, context: dict) -> float:
        score = 0.0
        triggers = instinct.trigger_conditions
        
        # File pattern matching
        current_files = context.get('open_files', [])
        for pattern in triggers.file_patterns:
            if any(self._match_pattern(f, pattern) for f in current_files):
                score += 0.3
        
        # Directory matching
        cwd = context.get('cwd', '')
        for pattern in triggers.directory_patterns:
            if pattern in cwd:
                score += 0.2
        
        # Context keywords
        recent_content = context.get('recent_content', '')
        for kw in triggers.context_keywords:
            if kw.lower() in recent_content.lower():
                score += 0.1
        
        # Normalize by number of conditions
        total_conditions = (
            len(triggers.file_patterns) +
            len(triggers.directory_patterns) +
            len(triggers.context_keywords)
        )
        if total_conditions > 0:
            score = score / total_conditions * 3  # Scale to 0-3
        
        return min(score, 1.0)

    def _match_pattern(self, filename: str, pattern: str) -> bool:
        import fnmatch
        return fnmatch.fnmatch(filename, pattern)

    def update_confidence(self, instinct_id: str, success: bool) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            if instinct_id in self._cache:
                instinct = self._cache[instinct_id]
                instinct.confidence_metrics.usage_count += 1
                instinct.confidence_metrics.last_used = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                if success:
                    instinct.confidence_metrics.success_count += 1
                else:
                    instinct.confidence_metrics.failure_count += 1
                total = instinct.confidence_metrics.success_count + instinct.confidence_metrics.failure_count
                instinct.confidence_metrics.success_rate = (
                    instinct.confidence_metrics.success_count / total if total > 0 else 0.0
                )
                instinct.metadata.version += 1
                self.save(instinct)
```

features.name: Observer Agent 行为监控
features.description: 后台守护线程持续监控 LLM API 调用和 Tool 执行,捕获完整行为上下文
risks: 对主 Agent 性能影响需控制在 < 5ms
线程安全问题可能导致事件丢失

features.name: Instinct 数据模型
features.description: 定义结构化的 Instinct Schema,支持触发条件、行为序列、置信度等多维度属性
risks: Schema 迭代可能需要数据迁移

features.name: InstinctStore 持久化
features.description: SQLite + JSON 双存储,支持高效检索和 FTS5 全文索引

features.name: PatternMiner 模式挖掘
features.description: 基于频率和成功率的滑动窗口序列挖掘,识别高频行为模式

features.name: InstinctBuilder 自动生成
features.description: 将挖掘出的模式自动转化为正式 Instinct 对象并持久化

features.name: 置信度反馈闭环
features.description: Instinct 被采纳/拒绝/成功/失败后自动更新置信度指标
risks: 反馈信号收集可能不完整

features.name: CLI /instincts 命令
features.description: 提供查看/删除/导出 Instinct 知识库的 CLI 接口

features.name: ContextCollector 上下文捕获
features.description: 实时捕获 git status、打开文件列表、工作目录结构等上下文信息
risks: IO 开销可能影响性能

features.name: Instinct 推荐引擎
features.description: 基于当前上下文实时推荐相关 Instinct,作为系统提示词注入
risks: 推荐准确性影响用户体验

action_items.item: 创建 hermes_agent/store/schema.py (Instinct Pydantic 模型)
修改 model_tools.py 集成 Observer hooks
实现 find_matching() 检索和推荐引擎
端到端测试和性能调优

integration_with_existing_architecture.run_agent.py: 在主对话循环中集成 Observer,关键是在不阻塞的情况下捕获事件
integration_with_existing_architecture.model_tools.py: handle_function_call 是所有 Tool 执行的入口,最合适的 hook 插入点
integration_with_existing_architecture.hermes_state.py: SessionDB 可用于存储 session 级别的 Instinct 使用历史
integration_with_existing_architecture.tools/registry.py: Tool 注册表可用于动态获取所有 Tool 的 schema,支持 Instinct 验证

backward_compatibility.learning_disabled_by_default: 新增功能默认关闭,通过配置启用,不影响现有用户体验
backward_compatibility.graceful_degradation: 如果 InstinctStore 初始化失败,Observer 降级为仅记录模式,不执行学习
backward_compatibility.data_migration: Instinct Schema 变更时提供 migration 脚本

privacy_and_security.sensitive_data_filtering: ContextCollector 应过滤敏感信息(如 .env 内容、密码等)
privacy_and_security.local_storage_only: 所有 Instinct 数据存储在本地,不涉及网络传输
privacy_and_security.user_control: 用户可通过 /instincts 命令查看、删除、导出个人 Instinct 数据

strengths: Observer Agent 架构模式业界已知,实现方案翔实
Instinct 数据模型设计完整,字段覆盖全面
学习流程各阶段定义清晰,技术路径可行
代码级实现细节具体,可直接指导开发
Hermes 集成方案考虑了现有架构
Features 和 Action Items 拆分合理,风险识别到位
uncertainties: ECC 实际源码未获取,具体 API 和参数命名基于合理推断
Pattern mining 算法细节需根据实际数据调优
Instinct 推荐准确性依赖大量实际使用数据验证
多线程并发场景细节(如 GIL 影响)需实测
verification_needed: 访问 github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code 获取实际源码
验证 ECC Observer Agent 的具体实现方式
确认 ECC 是否开源,License 类型
